title: Reading barcodes with a surveillance camera

posts.author: MarkSaxon (Mark Raubenheimer)
posts.cookedHtml: We are looking for an app, or an existing camera that can be installed on a conveyor. A client requires a solution to read bar code, and this information must automatically be transferred to a database. This solution will be attached to the overhead cage and will read the bar codes on all parcels that move on conveyor belt.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Is the database you’re using Monday.com?

posts.author: MarkSaxon (Mark Raubenheimer)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, No, We are using the clients database

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: How are you wanting monday.com to tie in?
